creator: dennis.r.friedrichsen@gmail.com
text:
On the right hand side of the www.freebsd.org frontpage, the links under "ERRATA NOTICES" do not work.

This links show as:
https://www.freebsd.org/security/notices/FreeBSD-EN-21:04.zfs.asc

Clicking on that link (use the recent zfs one as an example) brings me to a page that says "Page not found".

Expectation is that click on one should bring me to the full errata description.  (Note: The links under "SECURITY ADVISORIES" are working as expected.)
